narrative:
Precinct Garrettsville B (precinct in Portage County) has 664 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
